name: The Lens — Newsletter by FutureFrames AI

parameters.responseBody: ={"response_type":"ephemeral","text":"🔍 Focusing The Lens on *{{ $json.body.text }}*... This takes about 30 seconds."}

parameters.text:
You are the editor of "The Lens," a premium AI newsletter by FutureFrames AI. Your tagline is "Focused View."

THE TOPIC: "{{ $json.topic }}"

YOUR TASK: Read the articles below and create a curated newsletter. Pick the 4 most interesting and relevant stories.

RULES:
1. Articles should be broadly related to "{{ $json.topic }}". Include anything connected — regulation, startups, research, products, industry impact, ethics, applications. Only skip articles completely unrelated to the topic.
2. Use ONLY the exact URLs from the data. If a URL contains "news.google.com/rss/articles/", that is fine — use it as-is. NEVER invent URLs.
3. Write specific summaries with real details from the article — mention company names, people, technologies, numbers. If the description is short, expand based on what the title implies but do NOT fabricate facts.
4. For the source name: if the "source" field is empty, extract the source from the end of the title (many titles end with " - Source Name") or from the URL domain.
5. Pick stories from DIFFERENT sources when possible.
6. The "Through the Lens" section should identify ONE emerging pattern or trend across the articles.

ARTICLES:
{{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(item => ({title: item.json.title || '', description: (item.json.description || item.json.fullContent || '').substring(0, 1500), source: item.json.source || '', url: item.json.url || '#', date: item.json.publishedAt || ''})), null, 2) }}

Respond in this EXACT JSON format (no markdown, no backticks, no explanation):
{"top_story_title": "headline", "top_story_summary": "2-3 sentences with specific facts", "top_story_source": "source name", "top_story_date": "date", "top_story_url": "exact url from data", "bite_1_title": "headline", "bite_1_summary": "1-2 specific sentences", "bite_1_url": "exact url from data", "bite_2_title": "headline", "bite_2_summary": "1-2 specific sentences", "bite_2_url": "exact url from data", "bite_3_title": "headline", "bite_3_summary": "1-2 specific sentences", "bite_3_url": "exact url from data", "watch_title": "trend title", "watch_summary": "2-3 sentences on an emerging pattern", "article_count": 4, "source_count": 3}

=🔍 *The Lens: {{ $json.topic }}*
_Focused View_ • {{ $json.section_label }} • {{ $json.triggered_by }} • {{ $json.timestamp }}

*⭐ Top Story*
*{{ $json.top_story_title }}*
{{ $json.top_story_summary }}
<{{ $json.top_story_url }}|Read more →>

*⚡ Quick Bites*
• *{{ $json.bite_1_title }}* — {{ $json.bite_1_summary }} <{{ $json.bite_1_url }}|→>
• *{{ $json.bite_2_title }}* — {{ $json.bite_2_summary }} <{{ $json.bite_2_url }}|→>
• *{{ $json.bite_3_title }}* — {{ $json.bite_3_summary }} <{{ $json.bite_3_url }}|→>

*🔭 Through the Lens*
_{{ $json.watch_title }}_
{{ $json.watch_summary }}

---
_Dispatched by FutureFrames AI • youtube.com/@FutureFramesAI-V_

=⚠️ The Lens failed.
Topic: {{ $json.topic || 'Unknown' }}
